name: Medplum
description: Open-source, API-first electronic health record (EHR) platform with FHIR-native storage, HIPAA compliance and SOC2 tooling for developers.

seo.title: Medplum — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Medplum: Open-source, API-first electronic health record (EHR) platform with FHIR-native storage, HIPAA compliance and SOC2 tooling for developers.

when_to_use: Open-source FHIR-native EHR backend for digital health teams
HIPAA-compliant health record API with Postgres storage
SOC2-certified FHIR server for US health data applications
Building custom EHR workflows on open-source infrastructure
Alternative to Aidbox for teams preferring open-source FHIR

pros: HIPAA and SOC2 tooling built in
review.verdict: The most developer-friendly FHIR platform today, a strong pick for healthcare startups.
review.best_for: Healthcare startups building EHR or patient-facing apps on FHIR with modern tooling
review.not_for: Non-healthcare projects or teams that can't invest in learning FHIR

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
